options.a: starts as soon as the aeroplane commences rolling and stops as soon as it has come to a stop at landing.
options.b: starts when pulling out the drag devices and stops when retracting the drag devices.
options.c: starts at rotation and stops as soon as the aeroplane`s wheels touch the ground.
options.d: starts when the aeroplane reaches a height of 35 ft above the ground and stops when it crosses this height before landing.
